Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 6''' — The Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel helps reach Jade by forming a spiral in the core, condensing madra quality, increasing receptivity to spiritual forces, speeding up madra recovery, and improving control.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 6''' — The Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel focuses on improving capacity to contain madra by grinding at the core's borders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 6''' — The Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel works with any madra, including pure.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 7''' — The Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel is used for training.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 10''' — Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel is a technique used by Eithan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 12''' — Eithan taught Lindon the Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 12''' — The Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel is a technique used by Lindon to replenish his madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 14''' — The Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel makes Lindon's breathing heavy and long.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 14''' — The Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel is compared to a drill that creates profound depths in cores.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon has cycled the Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel for months.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon cycled according to the Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 1''' — The Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel is a technique that feels like breathing through a thin straw to Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 6''' — Eithan has practiced the Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel for years.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 12''' — The Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel is a technique Lindon has recorded experience with.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 16''' — For months, he'd been stretching his core using the Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 6''' — The Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel is a cycling technique used by Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon used the Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel to push for a deeper core.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon used the Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel to advance.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon has practiced the Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel for a year and a half.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon has confidence in the depth of his cores due to the Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon's Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel focuses on expanding the core.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — The Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel allows Lindon to fight another battle immediately.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — The Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel is a technique Lindon has tried to force.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
